scenarios.title: AI Memory SDKs and App Integration
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks to add, retrieve, search, update, or troubleshoot persistent memory in Python, TypeScript, Node, or agent application code using Mem0.
scenarios.role: Routes Mem0 SDK and OSS memory tasks to concrete Python/TypeScript APIs, configuration, and troubleshooting guidance.
scenarios.read_when: mem0, mem0ai, MemoryClient, AsyncMemoryClient, Memory, mem0ai/oss, user_id filters, persistent memory, memory layer, OpenAI agent memory
scenarios.best_for: Hosted Platform SDK calls, OSS Memory setup, provider/vector/LLM/reranker configuration, memory CRUD/search workflows, and app-level retrieve-generate-store patterns.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about an unrelated memory library, generic vector database theory, or a paper-to-skills workflow rather than the Mem0 repository.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `mem0` over generic SDK skills when Mem0-specific package names, APIs, filters, providers, CLI, self-hosting, or integrations are mentioned. Start at the root router unless the request clearly names SDK or provider configuration.

scenarios.title: Memory Operations CLI and Agent Tools
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks to operate Mem0 from terminal commands, agent JSON mode, MCP/plugin configuration, editor hooks, or framework integrations.
scenarios.role: Provides Mem0-specific command, plugin, MCP, Vercel AI SDK, and framework integration guidance with safety notes for secrets and side effects.
scenarios.read_when: mem0 init, mem0 add, mem0 search, @mem0/cli, mem0-cli, --agent, --json, MCP mem0, Codex hooks, Cursor MCP, Claude plugin, createMem0, @mem0/vercel-ai-provider, OpenClaw, Pi Agent
scenarios.best_for: CLI scripting, machine-readable memory operations, editor/agent plugin setup, Vercel AI SDK memory provider, and framework cookbook adaptation.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task only needs raw database/vector-store internals or non-Mem0 CLI tooling.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose the CLI sub-skill for shell commands and JSON envelopes; choose integrations/plugins for MCP, editor hooks, Vercel AI SDK, or framework adapters.

scenarios.title: Self-hosted Memory Platforms
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks to deploy, configure, or debug self-hosted Mem0 server or OpenMemory services.
scenarios.role: Guides self-hosted Mem0 and OpenMemory deployment, auth, API keys, REST endpoints, Docker services, migrations, MCP hosting, and operational safety.
scenarios.read_when: self-hosted Mem0, OpenMemory, server docker compose, dashboard auth, API keys, JWT_SECRET, ADMIN_API_KEY, AUTH_DISABLED, pgvector, Qdrant, local MCP, request logs
scenarios.best_for: Docker Compose setup, upgrade/auth troubleshooting, API key issuance, REST server behavior, OpenMemory MCP, migrations, backups, and environment validation.
scenarios.avoid_when: The user wants hosted Platform SDK usage or in-process OSS Memory without deploying services.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Route service, dashboard, auth, Docker, and OpenMemory tasks here; route local SDK provider config back to provider-configuration.
